Create a volcano plot from Wilcoxon results

Source: R/statistical_analysis.R
volcano_plot.Rd

Create a volcano plot from Wilcoxon results

Usage

volcano_plot(
  wilcox_results,
  top_labels = 10,
  p_threshold = 0.05,
  title = "Volcano Plot"
)

Arguments

wilcox_results

Output of wilcox_group_test().

top_labels

Number of top significant features to label.

p_threshold

Adjusted p-value threshold used to mark significance.

title

Plot title.

Value

A ggplot2 object.
